outcome_contract.why: When a room is unavailable for extension, staff see a disabled N/A button with no explanation. They don't know if the room is full, if the dates are wrong, or if there's a system fault — so they may waste time troubleshooting or asking a manager unnecessarily.
outcome_contract.intended_outcome_statement: Staff hovering or focusing an N/A button see a plain-language tooltip explaining the room is unavailable for the selected dates.
